name: Gorgonzola-Chicken Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 14-inch pizza pan with 2 tablespoons of olive oil and sprinkle with cornmeal.
2. In a skillet over medium heat, melt butter in the remaining olive oil. Add chicken, sage, pepper, and salt; sauté for 3 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. In the same skillet, add onions and garlic. Sauté for 30 minutes until desired tenderness is reached.
4. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
5. Pat the dough onto the pizza pan and fold the edges under by about 1/4 inch.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes.
7. Sprinkle onions, then chicken and cheeses over the crust. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes until golden brown.
